public_training_support_route.value: Luxembourg company-training co-financing exists at scheme level, with 15% base aid and 35% salary-cost weighting for certain eligible participants.

value: Scheme-level Luxembourg co-financing exists, but exact eligibility for this service is unproven.
No public source proves that any Ministry-of-Education certification implies INFPC eligibility.
The compound competitor story overreaches: freelancer tracking and an exhaustive substitute map are not verified.
Multilingual delivery and flexible scheduling are not unique on public evidence; the analytics edge remains unproven.

target_audience_summary.value: Luxembourg HR and employer buyers seeking broad corporate language delivery with flexible scheduling and reporting expectations.
target_audience_summary.omission_reason: Useful synthesis, but still partly inferential for the exact service.

product_specific_funding_eligibility.omission_reason: Route-level co-financing exists, but service-level eligibility is not proven.

unique_delivery_edge.omission_reason: Public evidence already shows tailored and flexible competing offers, while the analytics layer is not externally proven.
